name: ffmpeg-roomler
description: Stripped FFmpeg build for the Roomler remote-control agent.
Encode-only (browser decodes via WebCodecs). HEVC + H.264 + VP9 HW encoders via NVENC + Intel QSV/oneVPL + AMD AMF. Plus libvpx-vp9 software fallback.
No decoders, demuxers, muxers, parsers, filters, bsfs, protocols, devices — discards ~80% of full FFmpeg's libavcodec/libavformat surface.
Bypasses two Media Foundation regressions (RTX 5090 Blackwell ActivateObject 0x8000FFFF, Iris Xe Tiger Lake async-MFT gap). Unlocks HW VP9 on Intel iGPU.
Linked statically into roomler-agent.exe; NVENC + AMF use driver-provided DLLs at runtime so no extra MSI bytes for NVIDIA/AMD users.
